summary: Poor hallway‑style audience recording of a solid, smoking show with a standout “Don’t Ease Me In” performance
review: The concert itself is praised as a good, smokin’ set, with the highlight being the fiery rendition of “Don’t Ease Me In.” Unfortunately the tape was captured from far back in a noisy hallway‑like environment, resulting in echo, crowd chatter and muffled clarity that many reviewers found unlistenable. While the music shines, the technical flaws keep this release from being a reliable listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is generally positive (good performance, standout song) but recording quality is consistently reported as poor due to distance and hallway echo; weighted average yields a mid‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded from far back in a noisy hallway/near the hot‑dog vendor, heavy crowd noise, echo and muffled sound; some reviewers note occasional improvement with repeated listening.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Performance described as solid and smoking despite the bad tape; no specific comments on set pacing or transitions.
